title: galium spurium subsp. spurium
intro: Galium spurium subsp. spurium, also known as the red bedstraw or creeping bedstraw, is a perennial herbaceous plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Galium spurium subsp. spurium include reducing inflammation and soothing skin irritations, as well as supporting digestive health and immune function. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various ailments.
